announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 31, 2025, titled "Aditya Birla Capital Limited completes amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited, its wholly owned subsidiary, with itself; creates a unified larger operating NBFC.".

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Order dated 29 November 2024 passed by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench for inter alia convening meeting of the equity shareholders of the Company.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding filing of Joint Company Scheme Application with National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench in relation to the proposed scheme of amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited with the Company.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about the Final Order dated March 24, 2025 passed by the Hon ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench, sanctioning the scheme of amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited with the Company.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about the receipt of  no objection  letter from the Reserve Bank of India ( RBI ) for the proposed scheme of amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited with the Company.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about the Scheme of Amalgamation between its two wholly owned subsidiaries

announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 11, 2024, titled "Press Release titled Aditya Birla Capital Limited announces amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited its wholly owned subsidiary, with itself will create a large unified operating NBFC".

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited (Company) has informed the Exchange about the Scheme of Amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited (a wholly owned subsidiary) with the Company

announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited (Company) has informed the Exchange about the Scheme of Amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited (a wholly owned subsidiary) with the Company

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding filing of Joint Company Scheme Petition with National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench in relation to the proposed scheme of amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited with the Company

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of NCLT order approving the Composite Scheme of Arrangement of non- material Wholly Owned Subsidiaries of the Company.'.

announcements.headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about Copy of Newspaper Publication for notice of Court/ NCLT convened meeting of equity shareholders to be held on 7 January 2025

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about the receipt of Observation Letter with no adverse observations from BSE Limited and no objection from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited in relation to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Aditya Birla Finance Limited (a wholly owned subsidiary) with the Company

announcements.headline: Shareholders meeting
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Notice of NCLT/Court Convened General Meeting to be held on January 07, 2025

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI Listing Regulations- Scheme Of Arrangement For Merger Of Wholly Owned Subsidiaries'.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange that Regional Director (North-Western Region), Ahmedabad vide its order dated 31 March 2026 has sanctioned the Scheme of Amalgamation of Wholly Owned Subsidiaries of the Company.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/Merger
